text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: The autumn Tenno Sho... it's finally here.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yeah! We finally get to race McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (I've looked up to Mejiro McQueen for so long...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(She's an illustrious runner who deftly fulfills her
duties as a member of the Mejiro family.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(Seeing her grandeur was what inspired me to
reach that same level.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(After enrolling at Tracen Academy, I was thrilled
to be able to watch her run up close.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I kept running and running, chasing my desire to
grant the Satono family's wish... And now, all of a
sudden, I've made it.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (I've reached the same turf as my idol, McQueen.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (And today... I will challenge her as a rival!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I'll surpass the legendary "strongest stayer" and
show everyone that anything is possible!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Our next two competitors are coming out
together! It's Kitasan Black and Satono Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Goooo, Diamond! You've got this!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Go claim the title of the autumn Tenno Sho
champ, Kitasan!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Now, the runner you've all been waiting for! Who
could have predicted she would enter this race?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Mejiro McQueen, past back-to-back winner of
the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Just listen to those cheers! Tokyo Racecourse is
practically shaking!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Braving the heavy rain, countless spectators have
packed themselves into the stadium for the
chance to see this race firsthand!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...McQueen really is amazing.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah... But we won't go down easy either!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You're right! We've made it this far, after all!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm sure we can beat her!

text_block_list.name: Dia & Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
First place is mine!
Victory, here I come!
